Video.summary: Dirt & Trails kicks off with a 1987 Land Cruiser and a 1994 F-150, affectionately named Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Welcome to Dirt and Trails

Video.summary: Project Leadfoot gets a new roll cage, then upgrades to the lift, suspension, steering and brakes.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Video.summary: Chris and Eric install a 600hp Ford 460 Big Block and Tremec TR4050 into Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Video.summary: Team preps survivor '63 Galaxie for 1/2 mile top-speed assault, installing our turbo’d Black & Blue 347.
Video.title: Galaxie Teardown

Video.summary: A '63 Galaxie is rolled into the shop and fitted with the 347 turbo known as "Little Black & Blue."
Video.title: Galaxie Time Capsule

Video.summary: Team continues the transformation of its turbocharged ’63 Galaxie into a top-speed terror.
Video.title: Battlestar Galaxie

Video.summary: Team installs 200-mph capable suspension on its 1,000-hp '63 Galaxie
Video.title: Half-Mile Hauler

Video.summary: Mike and Pat have their hands full with the finishing touches on project white fright.
Video.title: The Galaxie’s Final Frontier

Video.summary: Engine Power embarks on a new project for SCCA’s inaugural SPEC Mustang class.
Video.title: SCCA SPEC Mustang Part 1

Video.summary: Prepare to be floored by this 1946 Dodge Power Wagon resto-mod from Vintage Dream Machines.
Video.title: Power Wagon

Video.summary: "Dark Matters," Jason Mode's '68 C10, is a subtly modded, powerful truck with killer black and red style.
Video.title: Jason Mode - Dark Matters C10

Video.summary: Out of the shop and into the yard! We take a weekend to rebuild a 350ci small block Chevy V8.
Video.title: Backyard Engine Build

Video.summary: We take the 350ci Small Block Chevy built in the parking lot and upgrade short block assembly.
Video.title: Backyard Build Upgrades

Video.summary: We finish our 350 Small Block Chevy with high-performance induction, then put it to the test.
Video.title: Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build

Image.alt: Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build
Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build
Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build

Video.summary: Jeremy and Jimmy wear out a pair of tires testing their Trailblazer SS in a drift like fashion.
Video.title: Drifting Trailblazer

Video.summary: The Drifting Trailblazer gets more muscle under the hood.
Video.title: Drifting Power and Style

Video.summary: Our famous Ford 300 comes home to the Engine Power shop for even BIGGER POWER upgrades.
Video.title: Ultimate Ford 300 Turbo Build - Part 1

Video.summary: Our Turbo Ford 300 dream build continues, assembling for big dyno power!
Video.title: Ultimate Ford 300 Turbo Build - Part 2

Video.summary: Our Turbo Ford 300 returns for dyno showdown: naturally aspirated vs. boosted!
Video.title: Ultimate Ford 300 Turbo Build - Part 3

Video.summary: How-to build a modern Chevy stroker starting from scratch with an LQ4 iron truck block.
Video.title: Iron Animal Part 1: Building a 408 Stroker

Image.alt: Iron Animal Part 1: Building a 408 Stroker
Iron Animal Part 1: Building a 408 Stroker
Iron Animal Part 1: Building a 408 Stroker

Video.summary: The latest GenX cylinder heads are flowed, installed and topped off with multi-port fuel injection
Video.title: Iron Animal Part 2: Flow Bench Testing Heads

Image.alt: Iron Animal Part 2: Flow Bench Testing Heads
Iron Animal Part 2: Flow Bench Testing Heads
Iron Animal Part 2: Flow Bench Testing Heads

Video.summary: How to turbo-charge an iron block LS stroker to make 1000 horsepower.
Video.title: Iron Animal 408: Wicked Turbo Power

Video.summary: Team creates over-the-top street/strip pickup wedging a nitrous-powered 427 big block into a compact S10.
Video.title: Lime Dime: 427 Big Block

Video.summary: How-to bolt on 150 HP with a wet-nitrous system, install a bed-mounted radiator and index J-wire spark plugs.
Video.title: Lime Dime: More Power

Video.summary: Team dials in Lime Dime drag truck at the strip.
Video.title: Race Track Tuning

Video.summary: E85 fuel promises high-octane performance for almost any engine. We put it to the test.
Video.title: High Compression SBC on E85

Video.summary: Our Big Block Chevy gets ready for life inside a high-revving hot rod.
Video.title: Hot Rod Big Block Chevy

Video.summary: We turbocharge a bone stock Big Block Ford on the cheap.
Video.title: Boosting a Stock 460ci Big Block Ford

Image.alt: Boosting a Stock 460ci Big Block Ford
Boosting a Stock 460ci Big Block Ford
Boosting a Stock 460ci Big Block Ford

Video.summary: Brad Starks' '32 Ford Coupe: a classic hot rod rebellion packing a supercharged LT4 with 680hp!
Video.title: Brad Starks - 1932 Coupe

Video.summary: It's BIGFOOT #1! The legendary truck that started the entire monster truck industry.
Video.title: Bigfoot

Video.summary: Part 3 of the Drifting Trailblazer, the Trailblazer gets a suspension overhaul.
Video.title: Drifting 101

Video.summary: Jeremy and Jimmy wear out some tires with their drifting Trailblazer.
Video.title: Drifting with More Power!

Video.summary: The Carcass Duo find a left for dead tow truck that they want to give a new life through fabrication
Video.title: Junkyard Tow Truck

Video.summary: A 50 year old tow truck gets a newly fabricated rear chassis to return it to its former glory.
Video.title: Crippling Rust Repair

Video.summary: We pump up the power on our Junkyard Find Tow Truck.
Video.title: Filling the Void

Video.summary: An interior dress-up for a 50 year old tow truck giving it new life on the road.
Video.title: The Patina Polish

Video.summary: We take a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck and turn it into a time crunching beast on the track.
Video.title: Pro Touring Chevy

Video.summary: Our 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck gets a new heartbeat.
Video.title: Pro Touring Power

Video.summary: We work on the suspension of a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck.
Video.title: Track Hugging Chevy

Video.summary: We take a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 and fabricate truck bed to fit our new custom Oval track rear suspension.
Video.title: Pro Touring Paint

Video.summary: We add the final touches to our OBS Pro Touring Chevy C1500 and take it to the C10 Nationals.
Video.title: Pro Touring Chevy - Track Approved

Video.summary: The Carcass crew found a 2012 Jeep JK at an auction and just had to buy it.
Video.title: Jeep JK Part 1: Suspension Overhaul

Video.summary: The guys put the final touches on the Jeep JK, adding a new bumper and winch.
Video.title: Jeep JK Part 2: Trail Accessories

Video.summary: We bring in an old 1984 Chevrolet Land Yacht to give it some custom touches for some family fun.
Video.title: Cruisin' Caprice Wagon

Video.summary: The Caprice Wagon is back in the shop for the rest of its upgrades.
Video.title: Crusin' Caprice Wagon Drivetrain Upgrade

Video.summary: We tear down Project Spartan to rebuild it, but its surprisingly strong engine changes our plans.
Video.title: Kaiser Jeep Chaos

Video.summary: Chris tests a new welder on Project Spartan's roll cage while Eric inspects the motor.
Video.title: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Image.alt: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Video.summary: Chris and Eric battle the truly insane rust in Project Spartan's '69 M715 Kaiser Jeep cab.
Video.title: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Image.alt: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Video.summary: Chris and Eric are tackling Project Spartan axles and turbocharging the Polaris UTV for off-road adventures.
Video.title: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Image.alt: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Video.summary: Chris and Eric are building the ultimate kayak vehicle, a Nissan Frontier Pro 4X, in one month.
Video.title: Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1

Image.alt: Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1
Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1
Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1

Video.summary: Under a tight deadline for SEMA, Chris and Eric are scrambling to finish their Nissan Frontier.
Video.title: Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2

Image.alt: Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2
Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2
Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2

Video.summary: Ian and Jessi have two weeks to start and finish a competition rock crawler from scratch!
Video.title: Poison Spyder Buggy

Video.summary: Very little sleep has been had by our duo over the past week – as Project Poison Spyder nears completion!
Video.title: Poison Spyder Buggy Part 2

Video.summary: Jessi and Ian are wired up as they hop back on Project Poison Spyder Buggy.
Video.title: Poison Spyder Buggy Part 3

Video.summary: Time for the ultimate payoff of the Budget Jeep and Alloy Jeep.
Video.title: Project A.J. Payoff
